/home/shaklea/miniconda3/envs/phase3/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/shaklea/miniconda3/envs/phase3/include -g -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/shaklea/miniconda3/envs/phase3/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/shaklea/miniconda3/envs/phase3/lib -L/home/shaklea/miniconda3/envs/phase3/lib -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/g2g.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/g2g.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o g2g  libg2g_lib.a -lpthread
